name: Fruit Cake
recipeIngredient: 2+ tablespoons molasses (Modify to your own taste)
2-3 teaspoons of cake spices (e.g., nutmeg, cinnamon, ginger)
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to approximately 400°F.
In a mixing bowl, add the whole wheat flour. Do not add the baking powder yet.
Add the crushed pineapple and its juice. The banana should be roughly mashed with your mixing spoon.
Break the banana into chunks and mix it with the flour mixture until combined.
Add the egg whites and enough water to create a thick batter (very thick or the fruit will sink).
Add molasses and spices, then raisins. Mix thoroughly.
Stir in the baking powder just enough to distribute it evenly without overmixing.
Pour the batter into a 7-8 inch loose-bottomed cake tin, smoothing the surface.
Bake for about 40 minutes, or until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean.
This recipe produces a very moist cake that can be kept for up to a week.
